function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully. I followed the inbox item’s explicit 8-file list exactly, ran OCR/frontmatter structuring as requested, preserved original bodies, and removed the inbox item after completion. Four invoice files were already schema-compliant; four purchase files were updated with bill frontmatter.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read inbox and system workflow docs, followed explicit inbox file list exactly, used finance schema fields only, preserved original note bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after all processing completed.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the inbox file specified exactly 8 target paths. Reading each target showed files 1-4 already had required invoice frontmatter; files 5-8 lacked YAML frontmatter but contained complete bill data, which was extracted into schema-compliant frontmatter and written while preserving body text verbatim. Inbox cleanup requirement from inbox-processing-v2-update was then satisfied by deleting 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
completed_steps_laconic: write 4 updated purchase files with frontmatter
